---
title: "Spring Week 5"
---

## Materials

📕 [Class slides]({{< var spring-week5-class-slides >}})

🗂 [In-class Peer Review: GitHub Materials Checklists]({{< var in-class-review-GH-materials-checklists >}})

🏛️ [GitHub Organizations List]({{< var github-organizations-urls-spreadsheet >}})

💭 [In-class team reflections]({{< var team-reflections-411B >}})

📖 [Capstone guidelines]({{< var capstone-guidelines >}})

## Schedule

12:30 - 12:45: Questions, Check-in, Upcoming Assignments

12:45 - 1:20: Peer feedback of GitHub organization & repositories

1:20 - 1:30: Break

1:30 - 2:15: Dedicated work time & meetings with teams

2:15 - 2:30: Break

2:30 - 3:20: Dedicated work time & meetings with teams

3:20 - 3:30: Team Reflection


## Recent & upcoming deadlines

{{< include _spring_deadlines_tables.qmd >}}

<div id="table-week5-8"></div>

## To do by next week

### 1. 🖋 Confirm the title for your Capstone Project
**Due when?** Submit by {{< var project-title-deadline >}}.

**How to submit:** Add final  title for your capstone project to [this spreadsheet]({{< var final-titles-spreadhseet >}}). If your title has not changed, please add add it anyway. 

<br>

### 2. 📝 Update your Techincal Documentation
**Due when?**  Due by {{< var td-final-draft-deadline >}}. Second and final TD revision.

<details>
<summary>**Instructions**</summary>
Work on updating your Technical Documentation based on your advisor's feedback:

- discuss feedback with your team
- start working on updating your draft
- contact advisors or clients for clarification and reply to comments within the document as needed. Remember to always do your research and discuss with your team first! 

</details>

<br>

### 3. 🗂 Update your GitHub Organization and respositories
**Due when?**  Due by {{< var repository-revision-deadline >}}. 

<details>
<summary>**Instructions**</summary>

- Integrate the peer feedback into your GitHub materials.

- All the items in the [Checklist for MEDS Capstone Projects Organizations and Repository]({{< var organization-repository-checklist >}})  must be updated by the deadline. Make sure you integrate anything that was missing!

</details>

<br>

### 4. 💥 Give your project a big push

In about 2 weeks we will start preparing for final presentations. **This is a good time to make a big push towards finishing your final deliverables!**

<!--
<center>
<iframe src="https://giphy.com/embed/Ym7JUEUTAyFSTJLc4K" width="350" height="350" frameBorder="0"  allowFullScreen></iframe></center>
-->

<center>
![](/411b_spring/images/super_busy_gif.gif){width=35%}
</center>
